response.global_analysis:
1. Reference Match: The lyrics reference was null, so manual transcription was performed.
2. Transcription process: Transcribed Japanese song lyrics and fast-paced post-performance talk/banter between FUWAMOCO and Kurochan, and translated them contextually into English.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitle blocks closely to the rapid vocal changes and expressions, aligning with natural dialogue breaks.

subtitles.original: 終わんないでトキメキ恋愛♥予習
subtitles.english: Don't let it end, this heartbeat love practice!

subtitles.original: 喉の奥がチクンチクン
subtitles.english: My throat is tingling, tingling

subtitles.original: 僕はドクンドクン
subtitles.english: And I'm thumping, thumping

subtitles.original: 心臓ごと 引きずり出して見せてよ
subtitles.english: Drag out my heart and show me!

subtitles.original: 気持ちいいね 面倒くさいけど
subtitles.english: It feels good, though it's a pain

subtitles.original: やっぱ照れくさいけど
subtitles.english: And it's embarrassing after all

subtitles.original: 死ぬまで忘れられないチューしよ
subtitles.english: Let's share a kiss we'll never forget until we die

subtitles.original: いかれた街はゾンビで溢れる
subtitles.english: This crazy town is overflowing with zombies

subtitles.original: 君は僕に恋してる
subtitles.english: You are in love with me

subtitles.original: ときめく胸につながるロープを引きなよ
subtitles.english: Pull the rope connected to your throbbing heart

subtitles.original: Bet bet bet on! Bet on chu!
subtitles.english: Bet bet bet on! Bet on chu!

subtitles.original: Bet bet bet on! Bet bet bet on! bet on chu!
subtitles.english: Bet bet bet on! Bet bet bet on! bet on chu!

subtitles.original: 本気で狂えるくらいの愛しさが
subtitles.english: A love so deep that it could make me go crazy...

subtitles.original: 美しいでしょ
subtitles.english: ...is beautiful, isn't it?

subtitles.original: Get get get on! Get on chu!
subtitles.english: Get get get on! Get on chu!

subtitles.original: Get get get on! Get get get on! Get on chu!
subtitles.english: Get get get on! Get get get on! Get on chu!

subtitles.original: せーの
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: ポン・チー・カン 終わんない
subtitles.english: Pon, chi, kan, it won't end!

subtitles.original: Get Get Get on chu!
subtitles.english: Get Get Get on chu!

subtitles.original: 我愛你 無問題
subtitles.english: Wo ai ni, mou mantai!

subtitles.original: Get Get Get on chu!
subtitles.english: Get Get Get on chu!

subtitles.original: わー！やったー！
subtitles.english: Wow! We did it!

subtitles.original: うまくいったしー！
subtitles.english: It went so well!

subtitles.original: よかったー！頑張ったね、クロちゃん！
subtitles.english: I'm so glad! You did great, Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: 楽しかった！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: That was so fun! Thank you!

subtitles.original: えー、ちょっとね、さよならする前に...
subtitles.english: So, um, before we say goodbye...

subtitles.original: えーっと、1個お願いしてもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Um, can we ask you for one favor?

subtitles.original: 1個だけだしん？
subtitles.english: Just one, shin?

subtitles.original: はい、1個だけしん！
subtitles.english: Yes, just one, shin!

subtitles.original: えっと、フワモコは魔界の番犬で、バウバウをよく言っているんですけど...
subtitles.english: Um, FUWAMOCO are demon guard dogs, and we often say "Bau Bau"...

subtitles.original: クロちゃん、カメラに向かって、フワモコのように可愛いバウバウをしてもらえますか？
subtitles.english: Kuro-chan, can you look at the camera and do a cute "Bau Bau" like FUWAMOCO?

subtitles.original: えー！できるかしん？
subtitles.english: What! Can I do it, shin?

subtitles.original: 行くしんよ！
subtitles.english: Here we go, shin!

subtitles.original: バウ！バウ！
subtitles.english: Bau! Bau!

subtitles.original: え、それがベスト？
subtitles.english: Wait, is that your best?

subtitles.original: もう一回！もっとやって！
subtitles.english: One more time! Do it more!

subtitles.original: バウ！バウ！
subtitles.english: Bau! Bau!

subtitles.original: 実は、もう一個やりたいことがあるんですけど...
subtitles.english: Actually, there's one more thing we want to do...

subtitles.original: 何？
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: さきほどやりましたけど、フワモコはいつもやってる自己紹介があって...
subtitles.english: We did it earlier, but FUWAMOCO has a self-introduction we always do...

subtitles.original: できれば、3人で一緒にやりたいです！
subtitles.english: If possible, we'd like to do it together with all three of us!

subtitles.original: あ、あれ可愛かったから、やりたい！クロちゃんも！
subtitles.english: Oh, that was cute, I want to do it too!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！じゃあ行きますよ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Here we go then!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: 凍らすよ！フワワだよ！
subtitles.english: I'll freeze you! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: わー！フワワじゃないよ！クロちゃんだよ！
subtitles.english: Wah! I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: あっ、クロちゃんじゃないよ！モココだよ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's not Kuro-chan! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: 3人合わせて...
subtitles.english: And together we are...

subtitles.original: いやいやいや！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: No, no, no! Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: ちょっとちょっと、クロちゃん！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: もう、嘘とかつくなよね！
subtitles.english: Don't lie to us anymore!

subtitles.original: モココ、パンチしちゃう！
subtitles.english: Mococo's gonna punch you!

subtitles.original: えー！痛い痛い痛い！
subtitles.english: Ah! It hurts, it hurts, it hurts!

subtitles.original: 救急車、1台...
subtitles.english: An ambulance, please...

subtitles.original: いらないよ、もう嘘！
subtitles.english: No need! No more lies!

subtitles.original: プンプン！
subtitles.english: Pout, pout!

subtitles.original: 落ち着いて、落ち着いて！
subtitles.english: Calm down, calm down!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、モコちゃん、大丈夫。
subtitles.english: It's okay, Moco-chan, it's okay.

subtitles.original: クロちゃんは、これからもみんなをいっぱい笑顔にして、素敵なアイドルになってくださいね！
subtitles.english: Kuro-chan, please keep making everyone smile and become a wonderful idol!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、モコちゃん、最後にクロちゃんにハイタッチしてお別れしようね。
subtitles.english: Well, Moco-chan, let's end with a high-five for Kuro-chan and say goodbye.

subtitles.original: 仲直り、仲直り？
subtitles.english: Reconciliation, reconciliation?

subtitles.original: せーの、ハイタッチ！ハイタッチ！
subtitles.english: Ready, high-five! High-five!

subtitles.original: ほらほら！やってみて、やってみて！
subtitles.english: Come on! Give it a try, give it a try!

subtitles.original: デコピン！
subtitles.english: Flick!

subtitles.original: 痛っ！なんで？ちょっと！ひどくない？
subtitles.english: Ouch! Why?! Hey! Isn't that mean?

subtitles.original: けど、フワモコちゃん、本当に、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: But FUWAMOCO, truly, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ありがとうしん！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you, shin!

subtitles.original: きゅんからの、バッキュン！おめでとうハート！
subtitles.english: Kyun and then... bam! Happy birthday heart!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！レッツゴーン！
subtitles.english: Bau Bau! Let's go-n!

subtitles.original: わあ！すごーい！花火だー！たまやー！
subtitles.english: Wow! Amazing! Fireworks! Tamaya!

subtitles.original: Wow! That was so nice!
subtitles.english: Wow! That was so nice!

subtitles.original: Things got really crazy, but I'm glad that you are happy!
subtitles.english: Things got really crazy, but I'm glad that you are happy!

subtitles.original: なんか、クロちゃん凄すぎて、分かんなくなってきたかも！
subtitles.english: Like, Kuro-chan was so incredible, I think I'm starting to lose track of what's happening!

subtitles.original: But we still have one more, one more very exciting thing to share with you!
subtitles.english: But we still have one more, one more very exciting thing to share with you!

subtitles.original: Yes! まだまだ楽しみがあるよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! We still have more fun in store!

subtitles.original: Maybe... what is it? Can you guess what it is?
subtitles.english: Maybe... what is it? Can you guess what it is?

subtitles.original: 何かな？何かな？
subtitles.english: What could it be? What could it be?

subtitles.original: Well, FUWAMOCO are at our first anniversary!
subtitles.english: Well, FUWAMOCO are at our first anniversary!
